planGroups.title: Computer Science - Critical Tracking Progress
planGroups.description:
Critical Tracking records each student’s progress in courses that are required for entry to each major. Please note the critical-tracking requirements below on a per-semester basis.

Equivalent critical-tracking courses as determined by the State of Florida Common Course Prerequisites may be used for transfer students.

Semester 1
    * Complete 1 of 6 critical-tracking courses with a minimum grade of C within two attempts: MAC 2311, MAC 2312, MAC 2313, COP 3502C, PHY 2048, PHY 2049
    * 2.5 GPA required for all critical-tracking courses
    * 2.0 UF GPA required

Semester 2
    * Complete 1 additional critical-tracking course with a minimum grade of C within two attempts
    * 2.5 GPA required for all critical-tracking courses
    * 2.0 UF GPA required

Semester 3
    * Complete 2 additional critical-tracking courses with minimum grades of C within two attempts
    * 2.5 GPA required for all critical-tracking courses
    * 2.0 UF GPA required

Semester 4
    * Complete 1 additional critical-tracking courses with minimum grades of C within two attempts
    * 2.5 GPA required for all critical-tracking courses
    * 2.0 UF GPA required

Semester 5
    * Complete all 6 critical-tracking courses with minimum grades of C in each course within two attempts
    * 2.5 GPA required for all critical-tracking courses
    * 2.0 UF GPA required

Semester 6
 * Complete COP 3503C and COT 3100
 * 2.0 UF and Departmental GPA

Semester 7
 * Complete COP 3530
 * 2.0 UF and Departmental GPA

Semester 8
 * Complete COP 4600 and COP4020
 * 2.0 UF and Departmental GPA

planGroups.title: Computer Science- Criteria for Graduation with Honors
planGroups.description: "Click here to view graduating with honors criteria. This is a preliminary estimate of honors status. Final honors status is determined by academic departments based upon review of requirements listed in the catalog. Major specific requirements: Magna Cum Laude 3.5 GPA on all courses taken at UF beginning the semester after accumulating 60 credits. Completion of an approved research project or creative work. Summa Cum Laude 3.8 GPA on all courses taken at UF beginning the semester after accumulating 60 credits. Completion of an approved research project or creative work."

requirements.title: Civic Literacy Requirement
requirements.description:
Students must complete two Civic Literacy Components: an Exam Component and a Course Component. Here are the methods that can be used to complete both Components:
(1) Completion of Advanced Placement Exam for US History (score of 4 or higher) counts for both Components
(2) Completion of Advanced Placement Exam for US Govt and Politics (score of 3 or higher) counts for both Components
(3) Passing the CLEP American Government exam with a score of 50 or higher counts for both Components
(4) Passing High School or State College Assessment of Civic Literacy and completing collegiate level AMH2020 or POS2041 courses via accelerated mechanism (e.g. AICE A Level or IB) or colleges credit (e.g. dual enrollment, college or university enrollment). 
(5) Passing the UF or other SUS Civic Literacy Exam and completing collegiate level AMH2020 or POS2041 courses via accelerated mechanism (e.g. AICE A Level or IB) or colleges credit (e.g. dual enrollment, college or university enrollment).

subRequirements.title: EXAM OPTION 1: Complete Florida Civic Literacy Exam Component
COURSE OPTION 6: POS2041 from AP Exam
